purpose: Classify unowned or unmapped file alerts.

rows.trigger: Path cannot be assigned to one organ or support class in V0.1.
rows.required_action: Keep dry-run only and route to Administratum V0.2 address book.

rows.trigger: Useful path exists outside target ORGANS/SUPPORT shape.
One active artifact claims multiple owner organs without common-support classification.
rows.required_action: Pick one owner or convert to common support.
